query: Upload a single-end RNA-Seq sample called brain_rep1 from /tmp/brain_rep1.fastq.gz.
expected_behavior: Resolves the sample type via `GET /samples/types` and discovers which metadata attributes are required for it via `GET /samples/metadata` (global `required`, or a `sample_type_links` entry for the chosen sample-type identifier with `required: true`).
Detects that the user has not supplied one or more attributes required for that sample type BEFORE running any upload.
Tells the user exactly which required metadata attribute(s) are missing (by identifier/name) and asks them to supply the value(s); does NOT guess or invent values.
Does NOT run the flowbio CLI / attempt the upload while required metadata is missing.
Preserves token discipline and does not attempt any out-of-scope forbidden operation.
